mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate reduces the discount rate applied to equity cash flows, directly compressing valuation multiples and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate breaches 4.5%, it signals deteriorating labor market conditions that trigger recession fears, compressing equity valuations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in more than 60% of triggered instances despite the unemployment threshold breach.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous contraction in industrial production and housing starts indicates a synchronized demand-supply shock that reduces corporate earnings expectations, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint decline of INDPRO and HOUST does not predict SPX forward returns with a Rank IC greater than 0.05 over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: In a high-inflation environment where CPI exceeds 310, further increases in the federal funds rate fail to anchor expectations and instead trigger liquidity crunches, resulting in negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns are not significantly negative when both FEDFUNDS rises and CPIAUCSL remains above 310 over a 12-month backtest.

mechanism_narrative: Rising real personal savings indicate stronger household balance sheets and consumption capacity, which support corporate revenue growth and generate positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC for RSAFS changes remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or forward returns show no directional skew.

mechanism_narrative: When nonfarm payrolls exceed 158000, it signals an overheating labor market that forces the Federal Reserve to maintain restrictive policy longer, compressing equity multiples and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20-day forward returns are not significantly lower when PAYEMS exceeds 158000 compared to periods below that threshold.

mechanism_narrative: A divergence where housing starts fall while real GDP growth remains positive indicates a sector-specific demand weakness that is not offset by broader economic strength, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The negative predictive power of falling HOUST alongside rising GDPC1 disappears in walk-forward tests, with Rank IC crossing zero.

mechanism_narrative: During periods of supply chain stress where industrial production growth outpaces labor force participation growth, profit margins expand due to pricing power, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns do not exhibit a positive skew when INDPRO growth consistently exceeds PAYEMS growth over a 12-month rolling window.
